notes: PMC review: mechanisms of photobiomodulation anti-inflammatory effects; covers cytochrome c oxidase, ATP, nitric oxide, and ROS pathways
PMC review: LLLT in skin — stimulating, healing, and restoring effects; covers wound healing, rejuvenation, and acne treatment applications
PBM in human muscle tissue for sports performance: supports acute recovery and fatigue reduction; evidence mostly short-term RCTs
LED therapy effects on muscle hypertrophy and gene expression: emerging evidence for mitochondrial upregulation; small sample sizes
